title: build_request: CALL_ID return is a net-negative abstraction
description: methods/mod.rs:702-716: build_request returns (&'static str, JmapRequest). The first element is always the module constant CALL_ID ('r1'). Every call site writes let (call_id, req) = build_request(...) and then passes call_id to extract_response. Because call_id is always CALL_ID, the tuple return is thinner than the boilerplate it adds. Rewrite: have build_request return JmapRequest only; have call sites pass CALL_ID directly to extract_response (it is accessible within the module). This removes the tuple destructure from every call site and makes the coupling to CALL_ID explicit in one place.
